title: [1.21.11 UPDATE] Better Biomes
description: Adds many different cool and amazing biomes, blocks, items, trees, and features to Minecraft.
body:
## 1.21.11 UPDATE OUT NOW!

#### WHAT THIS IS
Adds different cool biomes to the game but we make it different from like BOP and BYG.

#### IS THIS BUGGY
- yes 💅 so if you find one - report it!
- This is a solo project, so don't be alarmed if we aren't up-to-date on minecraft versions!
